title: Importing Outlook Calendar Items into Monday.com
excerpt: Can outlook calendar items be brought into monday.com?  Some of the PM’s I work with still use outlook to schedule their projects.  Every time a new event is added to a specific calendar I would like to bring the name an…

posts.author: moodyj2000 (Jason Moody)
posts.cookedHtml: Can outlook calendar items be brought into monday.com? Some of the PM’s I work with still use outlook to schedule their projects. Every time a new event is added to a specific calendar I would like to bring the name and date of the item into a monday.com board.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @moodyj2000, Jason,

If this is a Office365 calendar you should be able to do this with Integromat, there is a module to watch for Office365 calendar events and from there you can create a monday item. I do this myself the other way around, when monday item is updated > update the Office365 calendar.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
